utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format specifies 5 items: health_coverage (physical and mental health insurance with costs), property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs), travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs), additional_services (any enhancement services with costs), and total_budget (complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). In the final coverage plan: 1) health_coverage is fully specified with both physical_health and mental_health plans, costs, and coverage details; 2) property_coverage is fully specified with plan name, monthly cost, and coverage description; 3) travel_coverage is fully specified with plan, monthly cost, and coverage description; 4) additional_services is fully specified with two services, each with name, monthly cost, and coverage details; 5) total_budget is fully specified with monthly_total and annual_total. All 5 required items are present and well detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING:
We need to match each plan or service in the final coverage plan to its exact counterpart in the ground-truth ratings. The final coverage plan lists: 
1) Physical health: LifeFirst Standard Plan — found under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 9.
2) Mental health: LifeFirst Standard Plan — found under primary_health_coverage.mental_health with rating 9.
3) Property coverage: LifeFirst Standard Coverage — found under property_protection.home_content with rating 9.
4) Travel coverage: LifeFirst Standard Plan — found under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 9.
5) Additional services: Adventure Travel Coverage — found under travel_enhancement_services with rating 10; Technology Protection — found under property_enhancement_services with rating 6.
